steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the table
steps.content: This asks for $b$ in a linear model, so enter the visible table rows in Desmos and run a linear regression. Use $x_1=[1,2,3]$ and $y_1=[46,43,40]$, then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=-3$ and $b=49$.

steps.title: Confirm the requested value
steps.content: The model is $g(x)=-3x+49$. The question asks for the constant $b$, which is the y-intercept of the line, so $b=49$. A quick check: $g(1)=-3+49=46$ and $g(3)=-9+49=40$, matching the table. The answer is 49.
